pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py matching logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an inventory exactly named "BCA Assay Standards" with 5 standard items. While the Pierce BCA Protein Assay is a real Thermo Fisher kit (whose actual protocol uses a different dilution series: 2000, 1500, 1000, 750, 500, 250, 125, 25 ug/mL for vials A-H), this task utilizes a simplified, synthetically defined 1:2 serial dilution series (2000, 1000, 500, 250, 125 ug/mL) provided explicitly in the prompt instructions.
